description: You are an automation engineer at an adhesives plant where a chemical mixer's level sensor ('Raw_Level') is noisy and triggering false alarms. In Red Lion Crimson 3.0, create a new project to implement a 10-point simple moving average (SMA) filter. Create the tags 'Raw_Level' (Float), 'Filtered_Level' (Float), 'Level_Array' (Float Array, Extent: 10), and 'Filter_Index' (Integer). Develop a User Program named 'SMA_Filter' configured for 'Background 1' execution with a 100 ms tick. Write the filter logic using the created tags, referencing 'filter_specification.txt' and 'crimson_c_syntax_guide.txt' on the Desktop for implementation details. Save the final script code to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\CrimsonTasks\sma_filter.txt' and the Crimson project to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\chemical_mixer_filtered.c3'.
